goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'boat'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food and should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '4 people' at '13:00' on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the north and should be in the type of boat
Make sure you get address and postcode
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the same area as the attraction
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 13:00 on thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
